title: viola odorata subsp. cyanea
intro: Viola odorata subsp. cyanea is a subspecies of the sweet violet plant, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and fragrance. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Viola odorata subsp. cyanea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
